real-estate.niche: Luxury coastal real estate and relocation support
real-estate.targetAudience: Affluent buyers relocating to Charleston who want a polished local advisor with strong negotiation instincts
real-estate.offer: Relocation strategy, home search guidance, and luxury listing representation
real-estate.goals: Increase consultation requests, build trust before the first call, and turn market expertise into consistent inbound interest
real-estate.tone: Luxury editorial with calm concierge confidence
real-estate.keyThemes: Market clarity, relocation planning, neighborhood fit, luxury property positioning, client wins
real-estate.extraContext: Primary market is Charleston, SC. Relevant details include waterfront homes, walkable historic neighborhoods, turnkey interiors, and private outdoor space.

coach-consultant.niche: Revenue strategy consulting for founder-led service firms
coach-consultant.targetAudience: Founders doing 500k to 3M in annual revenue who need stronger positioning and a more repeatable sales motion
coach-consultant.offer: Fractional growth strategy and sales-system advisory
coach-consultant.goals: Generate discovery calls, strengthen authority on LinkedIn, and turn strategic insight into trust-building content
coach-consultant.keyThemes: Positioning clarity, offer packaging, sales process gaps, founder bottlenecks, high-leverage growth moves
coach-consultant.extraContext: Primary channels are LinkedIn and Instagram. The offer is premium and consultative, so content should feel thoughtful instead of loud.

saas-productized-service.niche: AI automation systems and productized implementation support
saas-productized-service.targetAudience: Lean teams, founders, and operators who want more leverage from automation without hiring a large internal systems team
saas-productized-service.offer: Automation design, implementation sprints, and ongoing system optimization
saas-productized-service.goals: Drive traffic to the website, generate discovery calls, and turn social content into proof of capability for productized services and SaaS offers
saas-productized-service.primaryCta: Visit the site to book a systems call
saas-productized-service.keyThemes: Automation workflows, before-and-after efficiency gains, service proof, product walkthroughs, traffic-driving hooks
saas-productized-service.extraContext: This preset should work well later for RelayWorks-style products and services. Prioritize content that can move someone from social into a website visit or demo request.

e-commerce.niche: Premium home fragrance and candle brand
e-commerce.targetAudience: Design-conscious shoppers who want elevated home rituals and giftable products that feel intentional
e-commerce.offer: Seasonal candle collections and home scent bundles
e-commerce.goals: Increase product page traffic, support collection launches, and turn social into stronger repeat-purchase demand
e-commerce.keyThemes: Product rituals, scent storytelling, seasonal drops, customer proof, gifting moments
e-commerce.extraContext: Brand visuals should feel premium and tactile. Seasonal launches and bundle promotions matter.

local-business.niche: Boutique wellness studio and recovery services
local-business.targetAudience: Busy professionals and active adults who want premium local wellness support with a calm, trustworthy brand
local-business.offer: Membership-based recovery sessions, infrared sauna, and mobility support
local-business.goals: Increase studio visits, strengthen local awareness, and make recurring services easier to understand and book
local-business.keyThemes: Service experience, customer wins, wellness education, community relevance, offer clarity
local-business.extraContext: Business is location-based and thrives on repeat visits, referrals, and stronger understanding of service benefits.

creator-brand.niche: Creator brand focused on creative systems and sustainable online growth
creator-brand.targetAudience: Solo creators and online educators who want better content systems without losing originality
creator-brand.goals: Grow engaged followers, increase workshop sales, and turn social content into stronger trust and repeat audience touchpoints
creator-brand.keyThemes: Creative systems, audience growth, process transparency, point of view, product education
creator-brand.extraContext: The brand should feel personal, smart, and useful rather than highly corporate.
